steps.t: Hata Kebir can be found far to the south-east of Ost Anglebed. Nimithil has asked you to seek out Jajax, if he still remains in Lebennin. You should b…
Aerthir can be found due south of Ost Anglebed along the shores of the Anduin. You have not found Jajax near Hata Kebir, but you should continue your …
Jajax can be found along the coastline to the south of Aerthir. You have discovered Jajax and Daxamat resting from readying their ship, and should spe…
A bottle of wine can be found in the basket next to Jajax. Jajax has asked you to share a bottle of fine wine with him and Daxamat.
Jajax can be found along the coastline to the south of Aerthir. You have shared wine with Jajax and should speak to him once more.
Nimithil can be found in Ost Anglebed in north-central Lebennin. You found Jajax and Daxamat preparing to sail from Lebennin. You should tell Nimithil…
